# Acceptance Traceability Matrix

Use one matrix in the Work Item Issue under `## Acceptance Traceability Matrix`. Do not create a second hidden checklist in a Change Request.

| AC ID | Source URL | Testable criterion | Owner | Evidence URL or `N/A — reason` | Result |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC-01 |  |  | Developer / QA / Security Reviewer / Human Maintainer |  | Pending / Pass / Fail / N/A |

QA records the verified commit SHA and may pass only when every in-scope row has evidence or a justified N/A.
